## Policy (F11)

1. New libs: add `package.json` `name` + `exports` first.
2. Only add `tsconfig.base.json` paths for exceptions (generated clients, Angular testing).
3. CI gate: `pnpm check:tsconfig-paths` (`--check-max` ratchet frozen at 4 until F11-PRISMA).
